title: EXTRASTAR 3W LED Desk Lamp, USB Rechargeable Reading Light with Touch Control, 24 LEDs Dimmable Bedside Lamp 3 Colors Stepless Dimming White
features: 【1200mAh Battery Operated Desk Lamp】The small table lamp has a large-capacity battery, no need to plug in when using. It also comes with a 80cm USB cable (5V/1A) for easy charging, suitable for most devices supporting USB ports, like plug adapter, power bank, PC and laptop, car charger etc. ( Please notice that the lamp should be charged to protect the battery's lifespan if long time no use)

【Eye-Protection Book Light】With 24 bright led lamp beads, the 3W rechargeable table lamp enables to provide a stable and flicker-free light source, protecting your eyes from glare lighting. Ideal for reading, working and studying etc.

【Color Temperatures and Brightness Adjustable】Stepless dimming and 3 color temperatures to choose from: warm light (3000K), warm white light (4500K) and white light (6500K). Sensitive touch switch to control the lighting mode for your various purposes. Long press to adjust the brightness, short press to adjust the color temperature.

【Stable Base and Flexible Arm】The gooseneck arm of the led table lamp can be rotated up to 360° and the head up to 180°, offering you complete control over the direction and angle of the light. Big stable base, stand firmly on the desk. Portable, lightweight and easy to storage.

【Modern Stylish Design】The bedside desk lamp features a beautiful water drop design, adds a touch of elegancy to any space, making it an ideal choice for bedroom, office, study room, school, dormitory, children’s room and more.
description: Product Description EXTRASTAR was established in 2009 and aims to provide a high-quality product of home improvement products, including 2/4/6/8 way extension lead, plug converters, Lights, indoor timer plugs, cable reels, and pedestal fans. Every purchase of an EXTRASTAR product comes with the following: Quick and friendly customer support Quality and reliability you can trust EXTRASTAR 3W LED USB Rechargeable Desk Lamp 24 LED beads Three light modes Stepless dimming 1200 mAh battery Gooseneck tube with adjustable illumination angle Power: 3W Lumen: Maximum 202LM Lamp Body Color: White Color Temperature: Warm light-White light-Warm white light The light can be switched on and off by briefly touching the on/off button on the body of the light, and the color temperature can also be adjusted in this way. Adjust the brightness of the light by touching the switch for a long time. This reading light has a flexible tube that can be adjusted at will to help you find the ideal angle of illumination. This table lamp comes with a 1200 mAh battery that allows you to use it without plugging it in. It is charged with the help of a USB plug, which is widely adaptable and easy to charge, solving your worries.
